sections.heading: Vocational Education and Training Funding Act 1992
sections.summary: Section 4 of the Australian National Training Authority Amendment Act 2003 establishes the short title of the Act and outlines its commencement dates. It specifies that Sections 1 to 3 and any other provisions not covered by the commencement table commence on 14 October 2003, while Schedule 1 commences on 14 April 2004 and Schedule 2 on 1 January 2004. The Act amends and repeals provisions of the Australian National Training Authority Act 1992.

requirements.text: Each provision of this Act specified in column 1 of the table commences, or is taken to have commenced, in accordance with column 2 of the table.
The day on which this Act receives the Royal Assent is 14 October 2003.
Schedule 1 commences on a single day to be fixed by Proclamation, but no later than 14 April 2004.

The Commonwealth Minister must cause a copy of the agreement and any amendment to the agreement to be laid before each House of the Parliament within 15 sitting days of that House after the agreement is made or amended.

The Commonwealth Minister must cause the Authority to publish the agreement or any amendment of the agreement on its website within 15 sitting days of either House of the Parliament after the agreement is made or amended.

sections.source_quote: This Act may be cited as the Australian National Training Authority Amendment Act 2003.
